commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=57517b329da24e7796898f9c46cab023cef19a22)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Nextcloud Talk webhook decoding to parse JSON before schema validation, return 200/no dispatch for valid non-Note events, and add replay tests for malformed JSON, malformed Note payloads, Document events, and setup pings.

PR surface: Source +32, Tests +77. Total +109 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main and v2026.6.8 parse signed webhook bodies through the strict Note schema and write HTTP 400 for schema misses before any ignore branch; I did not run a live Nextcloud server in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed for both a classifier correction and real webhook-path proof, so ClawSweeper should not take over this external PR yet.

target.title: fix(nextcloud-talk): return 200 for non-message webhook events instead of 400
target.author: liuhao1024

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
